## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests added or updated (coverage maintained ≥ 80 %).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Docstrings added or updated for all public API changes.
- [ ] `black`, `isort`, and `ruff` pass locally.
- [ ] `mypy` passes locally.
- [ ] No breaking API changes (or a migration guide is provided).
